title: Carrot Cake
ingredients: 1 1/3 cups pureed cooked carrots (use baby food carrots)
12 ounces cream cheese, at room temperature
instructions: Line bottom of pans with wax paper or parchment paper.
Sift dry ingredients (flour, sugar, salt, baking soda, cinnamon) into a bowl.
Add oil, eggs and vanilla to the dry ingredients.
Fold in walnuts, coconut, carrots and pineapple.
Pour batter into the prepared pans.
Bake for 30 – 35 minutes or until edges have pulled away from sides and a cake tester inserted in center comes out clean.
Cool on a cake rack for 3 hours.
Cream together cream cheese and butter in a mixing bowl.
Slowly sift in powdered sugar and continue beating until fully incorporated and mixture is free of lumps.
Stir in vanilla extract and lemon juice.
Frost cooled cake with cream cheese frosting.
notes: Recipe is from The Silver Palate Cookbook with adaptations by Julie
Use baby food carrots for the pureed cooked carrots
Make sure cream cheese and butter are at room temperature before making frosting
